LAW AND MOTION 301, MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT. MOVING AND OPPOSING PARTIES APPEARED. ARGUED AND THE COURT GRANTED DEFENDANTS BOSTWICK & ASSOCIATES AND LEISE KEHL'S JOINT MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT ON INTENTIONAL INFLICTION OF MALICIOUS PROSECUTION. THE COURT FURTHER GRANTED SUMMARY JUDGMENT ON PROBABLE CAUSE TO FILE THE UNDERLYING ACTION, NO TRIABLE ISSUE ON PROBABLE CAUSE OF OUTRAGES CONDUCT AS TO EACH DEFENDANT. PREVAILING PARTY IS TO PREPARE AN ORDER COMPLYING WITH CCP 437C(G). COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE IS GRANTED. PLAINTIFF'S OBJECTIONS TO EVIDENCE OFFERED BY DEFENDANT (INCLUDING THE MOTION TO STRIKE DECLARATION OF ROUDA) WAS OVERRULED. HON. JAMES J. MCBRIDE. REPORTER: ERIC THRONE CSR# 7855
